prototype_scope: Project evaluation with speculative XR spatialization plan

interaction_params.primary_input: Gaze dwell on oversized lane markers
interaction_params.secondary_input: Controller trigger or low-fatigue pinch confirmation
interaction_params.feedback_state: Focus ring + depth pulse + wake contraction + logo state shift

validated_in_engine: burst-triggered flash, shake, and warp surge

genai_workflow_log: No new generation stack was run during evaluation. Existing still images were treated as inherited assets; local review used source inspection, HTTP serving, and browser screenshot capture.
